column1: # Format: <relative path glob><TAB><exact pattern text or *><TAB><reason>
# A hit is waived only when BOTH the file path and the matched pattern align with an entry.
# Keep entries as narrow as possible; broad path globs with "*" pattern defeat the scan.

column3: Playwright real-flow specs use fixed dummy login credentials for isolated test members; real secrets (token/secret/sk-/keys) stay blocked in these files.
Backend integration tests use fixed dummy credentials; production source and configuration remain scanned.
Scanner regression tests contain synthetic credential samples required to prove format coverage.
The default profile contains documented local-only development credentials; application-prod.yml is separately guarded and has no defaults.
Archived phase-one design contains a synthetic password example and is not an active configuration.
